flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mt Hood Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mt Hood Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (3.4k → 3.9k).
